/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/assets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/charformat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/mapformat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/mappack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cold_start.dir/source/tilemap.cpp.o -o cold_start  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_mixer
